# Appendix: Transformations in regression models {transformations}

```{r transformations-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/transformations-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/transformations/"
)
```

```{r child-transformations, child="../lecture-content/38-transformations.Rmd"}
```
